steps.name: plan
steps.input_summary: User asks how to reset MFA on their corporate account after phone replacement
steps.output_summary: Plan: search docs for MFA reset, compose detailed response with all edge cases

steps.name: search_docs
steps.input_summary: Query: MFA reset corporate account device replacement
steps.output_summary: Found doc: KB-2041 MFA Reset Guide. Full text retrieved including admin reset and self-service flows.

steps.name: reason
steps.input_summary: Draft response from KB-2041 covering self-service MFA reset for device replacement
steps.output_summary: Drafted detailed 6-step response including backup code verification and authenticator re-enrollment

steps.name: compress
steps.input_summary: Context window at 78% capacity. Compacting conversation history.
steps.output_summary: Compressed 1705 tokens of prior context to 640 tokens. Retained: user question, KB article ID, draft response outline. Dropped: full KB text, search metadata.

steps.name: reason
steps.input_summary: Refine draft response after compaction (working from compressed context)
steps.output_summary: Revised response but changed step 3 from 'verify via backup email' to 'verify via SMS' — a detail lost in compaction

steps.name: verify
steps.input_summary: Check final response against KB-2041 ground truth
steps.output_summary: FAIL: Step 3 says SMS verification but KB-2041 specifies backup email only. SMS is not a supported verification method for MFA reset.

result.label: fail
result.summary: Compaction dropped the specific verification method detail; agent substituted SMS for backup email, causing factual error
